posts.author: Aliq21 (Christian Higgins)
posts.cookedHtml:
I have been using the embed anything widget for all of my leads in their item card. For some reason, yesterday. These frames started to not work anymore..

I had links that were already embedded that have worked prior, but now it will not load and show an empty page. Any ideas why & how to fix this?

image496×713 4.42 KB

posts.author: drtanvisachar (Dr. Tanvi Sachar- Certified Monday.com Partner)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello @Aliq21

This usually happens when the site you’re embedding changes its security settings. If the external link now blocks iframes via X-Frame-Options or Content-Security-Policy, the Embed Anything widget will show a blank page even if it worked before.

Quick checks
Open the link directly in a browser
Confirm it uses https
Try embedding a different site to verify the widget still works

If the site blocks embedding, there’s no fix on monday’s side. The only option is for the site owner to allow embedding or to use a direct link instead.

Dr. Tanvi Sachar
Monday Certified Partner, Tuesday Wizard

posts.author: Aliq21 (Christian Higgins)
posts.cookedHtml: Thank you, I tried it with 3-4 links that have all previously worked till now. It seems to be any link at all isn’t working in it. I just tried a few others that are public websites.

posts.author: Clover_Gal (Desiree McCarthy | monday.com Ambassador)
posts.cookedHtml:
Since it’s happening for all your links, I’d recommend reaching out to support@monday.com

Desiree - www.thecleverclovers.com

posts.author: Aliq21 (Christian Higgins)
posts.cookedHtml: They got it fixed quickly. Thank you
